title: campanula bertolae subsp. xylorrhiza
intro: Campanula bertolae subsp. xylorrhiza, also known as the Pyrenean bellflower, is a plant species within the Campanula genus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Campanula bertolae subsp. xylorrhiza include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety in modern medicine.
